title: vitis juncea
intro: Vitis juncea, also known as the wild grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis juncea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
